title: buffer overread in sqlite3_printf functions.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table);
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Updated Name' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL LIMIT 1);
